title: bupleurum ranunculoides subvar. burserianum
intro: Bupleurum ranunculoides subvar. burserianum, also known as Chinese Thorny Bupleurum, is a type of flowering plant in the celery family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Bupleurum ranunculoides subvar. burserianum include reducing fever, alleviating liver and gallbladder problems, and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential interactions with other medications.
